summary.sosovalue: Sentiment around SoSoValue on May 17-18, 2026, is predominantly positive and hype-driven, with community members actively promoting airdrop farming through daily check-ins, referrals, and trading on SoDEX to accumulate EXP points ahead of the Season 2 snapshot expected in late May. Key discussions revolve around maximizing points for the $SOSO airdrop, with users sharing screenshots of their progress (e.g., Silver tier at 237 SoPoints ranking top 3.59% globally), referral links, and strategies like trading USDC for weekly point boosts and 5% referral rewards. Metrics show moderate engagement on promotional posts (likes up to 95, views over 1,500), focused on urgency around the May 31 snapshot, airdrop calculators, and infrastructure developments like ValueChain and SSI Protocol, though some users express frustration over fake referrals and low progress despite consistent activity.
summary.sodex: Community sentiment for Sodex is bullish and practical, centered on airdrop potential tied to SoSoValue's ecosystem, with users discussing point accumulation via trading, staking SOSO for fee discounts (5-40%), and SSI mining boosts up to 220x. Key discussions include airdrop calculators estimating token allocations based on FDV and points (e.g., 7.627 tokens at $368M FDV worth ~$2.8), testnet/mainnet participation, and comparisons to other projects like StandX, alongside official announcements on staking benefits and high-performance order-book trading on the L1 ValueChain. Engagement metrics highlight strong interest in the official post (311 likes, 81 reposts, 10k views) demonstrating staking mechanics, while user posts show modest likes (up to 9) but high curiosity around calculators and referral boosts for the upcoming $SOSO distribution.
